title: Pocket Rewind
description: Feel the old Pocket Edition UI.
body:
!["What is this?" title.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d33a718aace036719f874c7ac88571c96f795c93.png)
This resource pack modifies the entire game interface to approximately the same one that existed in the Alpha Pocket Edition version. This pack makes you feel a little younger and remember the old days of the Pocket Edition, when the interface was more beige and gradient.

You also have a choice between a version of the resource pack with a pre 1.13 panorama (just like in the Pocket Edition), or a version of the resource pack with dark dirt in the menu (just like in the alpha versions of the Java Edition). The choice is yours!

!["Dependencies" title.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/77961bd37a1c469df5ef002707f4a34f6439b5d9.png)
To improve quality of life, we recommend installing:
[![Puzzle icon.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/417298a3eefe41eff976f8a78930e7cbe11dda9d.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/puzzle) or [![Optifine icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5e35e38edaba206fabf36ebc23f2ff0f36f7f2c5.png)](https://optifine.net/home)
This is necessary for the loading screen to work correctly. But this is **optional**. You can safely play without installed plugins if you don’t need the modified loading screen.

!["Credits" title.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e4d6da972704a841337b1eb169453a39f538d056.png)
**Sasha_K29:** - pack.png - all container stuff - advancments window/tabs - accessibility/report button - checkbox - recipe book - slider - social integration gui - demo background **SafirMDVK:** - pack.png - widget buttons - advancements widgets - server/world selection/resourcepacks/spectator buttons - edition title - stats icons - empty slots **Mojang:** - original gui - minecraft title - panorama

!["Additional information" title.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/61a2031a15e1e1fa3f60b5f1614a78f13579b834.png)
This resource pack does not connected with the ["Pocket Edition Alpha GUI"](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/pe-gui) resource pack, is not its continuation and does not use resources from it, everything is different in ours. To be honest, we didn't even know about its existence. We just came up with the same idea of ​​​​creating a resource pack with a pocket edition interface, so this coincidence is pure coincidence.
